_description: Fixture autopickup.json for the daily-digest tick-step self-test (#266). The digest scheduler state (enabled / time / last_digest_run) lives on the sibling state/digests.json — the tick's section-4f digest step reads it from there, NOT from this file. This file just supplies the surrounding tick state (interval, last_*_run for the other steps) so the digest run renders in a realistic tick. See docs/specs/2026-06-08-digest-tick-step.md.
